 It             is             your             responsibility             to             verify             this             confirmation             as             to             its             correctness             and             completeness             and             to             address             any             objections             without             delay             to             the             A-Mark             Trading             Department.             If             we             do             not
 hear            from            you            by            10            am            on            the            following            business            day,            this            confirmation            will            be            deemed            accepted            by            you            and            final            and            you            will            not            thereafter             be             entitled             to             dispute             the             information
 contained in the confirmation. This confirmation has been created automatically and is valid without signature                                                                                              .


 The               merchandise               described               above               remains               the               property               of               A-Mark               Precious               Metals, Inc.,               until               paid               for,               and               is               subject               to               our               order               and               shall               be               returned               to               us               on               demand. This
 merchandise,           until           returned           to           us           and           actually           received,           is           at           your           own           risk,           from           all           hazards.           No           right           or           power           is           given           to           you           to           sell, pledge,           hypothecate           or           otherwise           dispose           of           this
 merchandise            until            paid            for            in            full.            In            the            event            that            A-Mark            should            fail            to            receive            payment            when            due, A-Mark            may,            at            its            option,            charge            interest            on            the            monies            owed            at            its            prevailing
 rates.           The           parties           acknowledge           that           in           the           contract           relating           to           this           invoice           was           made           in           El           Segundo,           California           and           agree           that           any           action           brought           to           enforce           any           of           the           terms           hereof           may
 be           brought           in           the           County           of           Los           Angeles,           State           of           California.           If           either           party           brings           action           to           declare           their           rights           under           or           to           enforce           this           agreement,           the           prevailing           party           shall           be           entitled
 to be paid reasonable attorney's fees to the losing party.
